Patch Set 14:

Patch Set 14: Code-Review+1

I don't think this is good to use rename lock for every rename, especially given it's shared with migration and the latter may need lots of sync I/O ...

Patch Set 14: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

I think in the near term we should look into making the locking more fine grained.  This means that for cross-directory renames it needs the BFL + locks on the source and target directories, but for same-directory renames it only needs the lock on the parent.

That will allow scalability when possible, and consistency when needed.

commit.subject: LU-2430 mdt: Add global rename lock.
commit.message:
LU-2430 mdt: Add global rename lock.

Add global rename lock to protect migration process.

Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
Change-Id: I363ab58150350e5bc558fcd655c5e7e7b653af10
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/8826
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
